markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the Q1 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy Adopted:** A new top-funnel strategy will focus on high-quality articles to hit ambitious Q1 goals (30% monthly growth, targeting a 10x traffic increase in 6 months).](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Review Backlog Cleared:** The existing review backlog will be "parked" for internal rewriting by GrowthX, freeing up Dan's time to focus on the new, higher-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**New Content Streams Approved:** Two new content streams were approved: "Secrets Management" articles to frame Aembit as the next evolution, and 22 new topics to close LLM visibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**Performance Insight:** December set a new traffic high. The article "Two-legged and three-legged OAuth" was a standout performer, providing a model for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Pivot

  - [December traffic hit a new high, a positive sign given the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**Top Performer:** "Two-legged and three-legged OAuth" was a major success, demonstrating the right balance of technical depth and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** A pivot to top-funnel content was adopted to hit ambitious Q1 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Goal:** 30% monthly traffic growth → 10x increase over 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a stretch goal that, if met, will justify the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**Review Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Problem:** The existing review backlog is too time-consuming.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Solution:** Park the backlog for internal rewriting by GrowthX. Dan will only review a sample of the rewritten articles.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This frees Dan's time for the new, higher-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

### New Content Streams & Approvals

  - [**1. "Secrets Management" Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High search impressions for "secrets management" keywords show a clear opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
      - [**Approach:** Articles will cover the broad topic for SEO, with a dedicated section framing Aembit as the next evolution of secrets management.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [**Approval:** Approved.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**2. LLM Visibility Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aembit has a visibility gap in LLM search results where competitors appear.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX proposed 22 new articles based on prompts where Aembit is missing.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [**Approval:** Approved. These topics will be merged into the "New Topics" tab for a unified approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

### Content Quality & Terminology

  - [**Terminology:** Standardize on "workload identity" over "machine identity" to avoid reader confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX will use both for SEO, but will introduce "workload identity" as the primary term.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Article Structure:** The "vendor-driven" section in new articles is intentional.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It's a key brand element to establish Aembit's POV in general topic articles.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Glossary:** Continue production.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**Rationale:** While short pages limit SEO, they are valuable for LLM visibility. Production ends early Feb.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [Park the existing review backlog in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Merge the 22 new LLM-driven topics into the "New Topics" tab for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
      - [Begin production on "Secrets Management" content.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Deliver 7–10 new articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
  - [**Dan:**](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Review and approve the new topics in the "New Topics" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [Review the "vendor-driven" section in the new articles to ensure directional accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/A4oyxT6d1YjM7U8vnk7x6-qANMh22SjE?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
